[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001 3
1 1100001 3
2 0000110 2
3 0111110 5
4 1101001 4
5 0000011 2
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1101111 6
23 32 1100001 3 match 0 1
34 43 1100111 5
45 54 0111110 5 match 3
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1101011 5
70 07 0111011 5

13 31 1101111 6
24 42 1100111 5
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 1101111 6
57 75 0111111 6
60 06 1111011 6
71 17 1101111 6

03 30 1111011 6
14 41 1101111 6
25 52 1111111 a

47 74 0000111 3
50 05 0111111 6
61 16 1101111 6
72 27 1100011 4

04 40 0111111 6
15 51 1111111 a

37 73 1100011 4
